path: Problem: Compare two cross-tab (matrix) data sources by matching both row keys and column headers, and return whether the intersecting values are equal
Action: Use INDEX with two MATCH functions (row MATCH on key column, column MATCH on header row) to retrieve each matrix value; wrap each retrieval in IFERROR; compare results with IF
Observation: Two-way lookup (row+column) reliably aligns values across separate tables even when column sets differ; IFERROR prevents #N/A from breaking the comparison when a key/header is missing
